description: Use nanobot from Mattermost channels and DMs.
requirements: Mattermost server URL, bot token, channel access

setup.tryIt: Mention the bot in a Mattermost channel or send it a direct message.
setup.summary: Mattermost connects through a bot account on your server and listens for channel and direct messages.
steps: Create a Mattermost bot account and copy its access token.
Enter the server URL and grant the bot access to the target team and channels.
Save and enable Mattermost, then mention the bot or send a direct message.

serverUrl.label: Server URL
serverUrl.help: Use the base URL of your Mattermost workspace.

token.label: Bot token
token.help: Create this from a Mattermost bot account.
